lastReleaseMessage: library grid: drop minmax floor from 78px to 64px so it doesn't collapse to one column in narrow editor panels; add min-width:0 safeguard

barRaise.topFinding: Two days, zero commits, zero actions applied: every finding from the 2026-05-27 bar-raise is still open AND the 2026-05-27 canonical audit landed two new HIGH spec drifts (PROJECT_SPEC.md §4.4 still describes a retired SYMBOLS function map; §4.5 still describes the data/ingredients/<slug>.png renderer path that v0.15.0 killed). The dashboard JSON's audit block still reads 2026-05-20 / 0/0/0 because the canonical-audit skill doesn't write back to YaA.json, which is the second symptom of the skill-chain-handoff bug yesterday's bar-raise flagged on write-dashboard-status.ps1's barRaise-clobber. The app itself is fine; the docs perimeter, the public artifacts, and the skill-output pipeline are the issue. One disciplined sweep day closes em-dashes, rewrites README + PROJECT_SPEC §4.4/§4.5/§11, and converts write-dashboard-status.ps1 to read-merge-write.
